title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
Opening a Demat and Trading Account is the first step towards participating in the financial markets and building long-term wealth. Through IDBI Capital Markets & Securities Ltd. (ICMS), a wholly owned subsidiary of IDBI Bank, customers can seamlessly invest and trade across equities, derivatives, IPOs, mutual funds and more. The integrated platform offers a secure, user-friendly and efficient experience for managing investments with ease. Whether you are a new investor or an experienced trader, the IDBI ecosystem provides trust, convenience and tools for your investment journey.
Open your all in one Demat + Trading account instantly with a smooth, 100% online process.
Trade smartly across Stocks, IPOs, F&O, and ETFs—all from one powerful platform
Experience lightning fast, secure trading on an advanced Web & Mobile platform built for performance.
Go completely paperless with bank grade security, expert research insights, and advisory support at every step.
Demat and Trading services are now offered through IDBI Capital Markets & Securities Ltd. (ICMS), a wholly owned subsidiary of IDBI Bank, enabling an integrated experience.
Competitive and transparent pricing. Visit ICMS website for details. 
A Demat (Dematerialised) account allows investors to hold securities such as shares, bonds, mutual funds, and ETFs in electronic form, eliminating the need for physical certificates.
A Trading account is used to buy and sell securities in the stock market. It is linked to your Demat account and bank account for seamless transactions.
Who provides Demat and Trading services for IDBI Bank customers? 
Demat and Trading account opening and related services are offered through IDBI Capital Markets & Securities Limited (ICMS), a wholly owned subsidiary of IDBI Bank.
